name: Bar MAZE
tagline: James Beard-nominated omakase in Kakaako — intimate counter seating where every course is theater.
parking: Street parking on Auahi St and surrounding Kakaako blocks; metered spots free after 6pm
talkStory: Created by Justin and Tom Park (the duo behind award-winning Bar Leather Apron) with head chef Ki Chung (2024/2025 James Beard nominee). Justin Park won the 2023 James Beard Award for bartending. Opened 2021. Reservations essential weeks in advance. Wed–Sun from 5pm. The cocktail or non-alcoholic pairings are designed to match each course — worth the upgrade.
